data.title: Redwire Awarded Contract to Deliver Quantum-Secure Spacecraft for European Space Agency's QKDSat
data.description: In Belgium, Redwire Corporation (NYSE: RDW), a prominent player in space and defense tech solutions, has secured a deal to create a quantum-secure satellite as part of the European Space Agency's (ESA) Quantum Key Distribution Satellite (QKDSat) initiative under ESA's Advanced Research in Telecommunications Systems (ARTES) Partnership Projects program. The project involves the development of a European-built Hammerhead spacecraft by Redwire to bolster space defense capabilities.

data.title: Mobix Labs Announces Reverse Stock Split
data.description: A semiconductor and connectivity company, Mobix Labs, Inc. (Nasdaq: MOBX), based in Irvine, California, catering to defense, aerospace, and high-reliability sectors, disclosed a 1-for-10 reverse stock split. This move was sanctioned by the board of directors and applies to both Class A and Class B common stock, each with a par value of $0.00001 per share. This decision marks a significant development for the company in its efforts to adapt to market conditions and enhance shareholder value.

data.title: MRI-Simmons and TransUnion Expand Access to Premium Audience Segments in the TruAudience® Data Marketplace
data.description: MRI-Simmons has revealed an enhanced partnership with TransUnion (NYSE: TRU) to offer advertisers, agencies, and publishers a wider range of premium audience segments through the TruAudience® Data Marketplace. Marketers now have access to numerous syndicated audience segments crafted from insights sourced from MRI-Simmons’ top-notch consumer research. This collaboration enables marketers to leverage thousands of psychographic profiles for targeted advertising.

data.title: Fluor Corporation to Hold First Quarter Earnings Conference Call
data.description: Fluor Corporation (NYSE: FLR) is scheduled to host a conference call to discuss its first-quarter performance for the period ending March 31, 2026. Interested individuals can tune in on Friday, May 8, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time to hear from CEO Jim Breuer and CFO John Regan. Financial results will be disclosed before the market opens. Those who wish to participate can access the live webcast and a replay, along with presentation slides, on the investor section of Fluor's website.

data.title: WELL Health Partners with AliveCor to Bring AI-Powered Cardiac Monitoring and Cardiologist Oversight to Canadians
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, WELL Health Technologies Corp. is pleased to announce a strategic partnership with AliveCor, Inc. This partnership involves the global leader in AI-powered personal electrocardiogram (ECG) technology. WELL Health Technologies Corp., listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange as WELL and on the OTCQX as WHTCF, is a digital healthcare company focused on using technology to empower healthcare practitioners and patients worldwide. This collaboration aims to positively impact health outcomes. The partnership will involve Canadian-registered cardiologists and leverage innovative ECG technology.

data.title: Roots Announces Details of its Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2025 Results Conference Call
data.description: Roots Corporation, a leading outdoor-lifestyle brand, will be holding a conference call on Thursday, April 9, 2026, to discuss its fourth quarter and fiscal year 2025 results. The call will be hosted by Ms. Meghan Roach, President & Chief Executive Officer, and Mr. Leon Wu, Chief Financial Officer. The conference call is scheduled to start at 8:00 AM EST on April 9th. This event comes as the company, listed as TSX: ROOT, aims to provide transparency and insights into its financial performance for investors and stakeholders.

data.title: The Flamingo Estate Bathhouse by Kohler Debuts as a Nature‑Infused Wellness Sanctuary at Milan Design Week 2026
data.description: Milan Design Week 2026 will feature a captivating multi-sensory installation by Kohler and Richard Christiansen, the founder of Flamingo Estate. This unique experience will immerse visitors in an elemental universe where architecture, landscape, and tranquility blend seamlessly. The exhibition is set to attract a large audience, showcasing the innovative collaboration between these two creative forces.

data.title: Cartesian Therapeutics Announces New Employment Inducement Grants
data.description: On April 2, 2026, Cartesian Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: RNAC) revealed that it granted inducement awards to two new employees. The awards include options to buy a total of 52,450 shares of the Company's common stock at $6.39 per share, the closing trading price on Nasdaq on the grant date. The options were issued under the Amended and Restated 2018 Employment Inducement Incentive Award Plan and sanctioned by the board of directors. Vesting is structured as 25% on April 1, 2027, followed by thirty-six equal monthly installments until full vesting on April 1, 2030. These options have a ten-year term, meeting Nasdaq Listing Rules' Rule 5635(c)(4) as crucial inducements for the new employees joining the Company.

data.title: Elwood Technologies Appoints Michael Abib as CEO
data.description: In London on April 2, 2026, Elwood Technologies, a company offering institutional-grade digital asset trading infrastructure, revealed the selection of Michael Abib as the new Chief Executive Officer. Abib officially took on this role after joining Elwood in 2023 as the Chief Product Officer. This announcement marks a significant development in the company's leadership team, highlighting their strategic vision moving forward. No specific numbers were mentioned in the provided text.

data.title: BCE Q1 2026 results to be announced May 7
data.description: On April 2, 2026, BCE Inc. (TSX: BCE) (NYSE: BCE) announced that their first-quarter 2026 results conference call with the financial community is scheduled for Thursday, May 7, 2026, at 8:00 am Eastern Time. Mirko Bibic, President and Chief Executive Officer, will be among the participants.

data.title: Skye Bioscience Treats First Patient in Nimacimab Higher-Dose Expansion Study Evaluating Exposure-Response to Inform Phase 2b Dose Selection for GLP-1 Combination Development
data.description: Anticipated in the fourth quarter of 2026, significant safety and pharmacokinetic data are set to be released. A separate Data Monitoring Committee is in charge of supervising the study.

data.title: Blue Moon Metals Closes Previously Announced Acquisition of the Gage Project Located in Washington County, Southern Utah and Appoints Reza Ehsani as Senior Vice President, Projects
data.description: On April 2, 2026, Blue Moon Metals Inc. completed the acquisition of the Gage Project in Washington County, Southern Utah, USA, from Liberty Gold USA. The company, listed on TSXV as MOON and NASDAQ as BMM, finalized the deal.

data.title: Aurora Mobile Unveils 500% Efficiency Boost Case Study at Tourism × Web3 Summit 2026
data.description: Today, Aurora Mobile Limited, a top player in customer engagement and marketing tech services, shared their success at the "Tourism × Web3 Summit 2026," through their Japanese subsidiary, Aurora Mobile Japan K.K. The subsidiary played a significant role as a sponsor and keynote speaker at the event. This platform showcased Aurora Mobile's AI technologies that are reshaping the tourism and Web3 industries. The event was a key opportunity for the Company to exhibit its innovative solutions.

data.title: RuggON Showcases Rugged Mobility Solutions at Mining Turkey 2026
data.description: Enhancing Mining Operations with Durable Mobility in Challenging Remote Settings ISTANBUL, April 2, 2026 - RuggON, a division of Ubiqconn Technology specializing in rugged mobile computing solutions, is set to unveil its newest advancements at an upcoming event. The company aims to address the needs of mining operations in harsh conditions through their innovative products. This initiative showcases their commitment to supporting industries with reliable technology.

data.title: MAX Power Advances Basin-Scale Discovery Potential with Multi-Zone Natural Hydrogen and Helium Intervals at Bracken
data.description: A recently discovered analog target similar to the original find has been identified near the Genesis Trend. This new Lawson Analog target presents promising similarities to the initial discovery and is anticipated to offer substantial potential. The proximity to the original find adds to the excitement, with experts noting its potential significance. The discovery of this analog target showcases potential for further exploration and development in the area, with key figures in the industry taking note of this significant find. This new finding near the Genesis Trend opens up opportunities for future exploration and development prospects.

data.title: Mayfair Gold Announces Acquisition of the Guibord, Marriott and Holloway Properties from Plato Gold
data.description: On April 2, 2026, in Vancouver, BC, Mayfair Gold Corp. disclosed a significant development. The company, trading as MFG on the TSXV and MINE on the NYSE American, has officially finalized an Acquisition Agreement with Plato Gold Corp. This agreement marks a strategic move for Mayfair Gold as it looks to expand its operations and offerings.
Wix declares initial outcomes of Dutch auction tender offer.

data.title: WindRose Health Investors Launches WindRose Gradient, a Dedicated Technology Services Team to Support Portfolio Company AI Capabilities
data.description: On April 2, 2026, a New York healthcare private equity firm, WindRose Health Investors, LLC, revealed the launch of WindRose Gradient ("Gradient"). This specialized technology services team aims to aid portfolio companies in identifying and implementing innovative solutions.
Russia's oil export capacity cut by 1mbpd by drone strikes - Sources
Trump has discussed firing Attorney General Pam Bondi, per NYT
